predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_heirs_other_than_surviving_spouse
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves heirs other than the surviving spouse.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_no_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves no heirs at all.

predicates.name: is_estate_of
predicates.description: The estate belongs to the deceased person.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires full ownership of the entire estate as a legal consequence of succession.
